Headline: #34 South Michigan Temporary Reroute at Michigan/126th
ShortDescription: #34 South Michigan buses are temporarily rerouted in both directions via Michigan, 123rd, State, 127th and Michigan due to construction near Michigan/126th.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
How does this affect my trip?

#34 South Michigan buses are temporarily rerouted in both directions via Michigan, 123rd, State, 127th and Michigan, then will resume their normal route.

Allow extra travel time.

Why is service being changed?

Buses are rerouted due to construction near Michigan/126th.
